Create DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration with client authentication via client certificate.
post
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager


Create DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration and initialize renewal monitor.

Body Params
caName
string
length between 1 and 255
Example Display Name
fqdn
string
length between 1 and 255
digicert.example.com
revocationEnabled
boolean

false
clientCert
object

clientCert object
filename
string
required
length between 1 and 255
Client certificate filename should extend .p12.

example.p12
data
array of strings
required
Must be base-64 encoded data obtainable by openssl base64 < /file/path/filename.p12 | tr -d '\n' | pbcopy in linux terminal, or similar parsing methods.


string



string



ADD string
password
password | null
••••••••••••••••
Response

201
Created

Response body
object
id
string
length ≥ 1
href
string

curl --request POST \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager \
     --header 'accept: */*' \
     --header 'content-type: application/json' \
     --data '
{
  "clientCert": {
    "filename": "example.p12",
    "data": [
      "",
      ""
    ],
    "password": "password-example"
  },
  "caName": "Example Display Name",
  "fqdn": "digicert.example.com",
  "revocationEnabled": false
}
'

{
  "id": "1",
  "href": "https://yourJamfProUrl.jamf/api/v1/resource/1"
}
-----
Validate DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager client certificate
post
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/validate-client-certificate


Validate DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager client certificate for file format and correct password. Must be base64-encoded PKCS#12 file content, obtainable by openssl base64 < /file/path/filename.p12 | tr -d '\n' | pbcopy in linux terminal, or similar parsing methods.

Body Params
filename
string
required
length between 1 and 255
Client certificate filename should extend .p12.

example.p12
data
array of strings
required
Must be base-64 encoded data obtainable by openssl base64 < /file/path/filename.p12 | tr -d '\n' | pbcopy in linux terminal, or similar parsing methods.


string



string



ADD string
password
password | null
••••••••••••••••
Response
204
DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager certificate for client server is of valid file format and has correct password.

curl --request POST \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/validate-client-certificate \
     --header 'content-type: application/json' \
     --data '
{
  "filename": "example.p12",
  "data": [
    "",
    ""
  ],
  "password": "password-example"
}
'
-----
Retrieve DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration
get
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/{id}


Retrieve the current configuration of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager.

Path Params
id
string
required
ID of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration

Responses

200
Successful response returns a DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration

Response body
object
id
string
caName
string
length between 1 and 255
fqdn
string
length between 1 and 255
revocationEnabled
boolean
clientCert
object
filename
string
length ≤ 255
Client certificate filename with .p12 extension.

serialNumber
string
subject
string
issuer
string
expirationDate
date-time

curl --request GET \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/ \
     --header 'accept: application/json'

{
  "id": "1",
  "caName": "Example Display Name",
  "fqdn": "digicert.example.com",
  "revocationEnabled": true,
  "clientCert": {
    "filename": "example.p12",
    "serialNumber": "123456789456123",
    "subject": "CN=SubjectName, OU=OrganizationalUnit, O=Organization, L=Location, ST=State, C=Country",
    "issuer": "IssuerName",
    "expirationDate": "2018-10-15T16:39:56Z"
  }
}

Delete DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration
delete
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/{id}


Delete the current configuration of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager.

Path Params
id
string
required
ID of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration

1
Responses
204
Successful deletion of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration

curl --request DELETE \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/1 \
     --header 'accept: application/json'

-----
Update DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration
patch
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/{id}


Update DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration, where the client certificate information must be provided in full or not at all.

Path Params
id
string
required
ID of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration.

2
Body Params
caName
string
length between 1 and 255
Example Display Name
fqdn
string
length between 1 and 255
digicert.example.com
revocationEnabled
boolean

true
clientCert
object

clientCert object
filename
string
required
length between 1 and 255
Client certificate filename should extend .p12.

example.p12
data
array of strings
required
Must be base-64 encoded data obtainable by openssl base64 < /file/path/filename.p12 | tr -d '\n' | pbcopy in linux terminal, or similar parsing methods.


string



ADD string
password
password | null
••••••••••••••••
Responses
204
No Content

curl --request PATCH \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/2 \
     --header 'accept: application/json' \
     --header 'content-type: application/merge-patch+json' \
     --data '
{
  "clientCert": {
    "filename": "example.p12",
    "data": [
      ""
    ],
    "password": "password-example"
  },
  "caName": "Example Display Name",
  "fqdn": "digicert.example.com",
  "revocationEnabled": true
}
'
-----
Get connection status of DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager for a given ID
get
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/{id}/connection-status


Get connection status of DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager for a given ID.

Path Params
id
string
required
ID of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager settings.

12
Responses

200
Successful connection to DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager.

Response body
object
status
string
length between 1 and 255

curl --request GET \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/12/connection-status \
     --header 'accept: application/json'

{
  "status": "Successfully connected"
}
-----
Retrieve list of DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager Settings dependencies
get
https://yourServer.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager/{id}/dependencies


Retrieve list of DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager Settings dependencies.

Path Params
id
string
required
ID of the DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager configuration.

Response

200
Success

Response body
object
totalCount
integer
results
array of objects
object
configProfileId
integer
configProfileName
string
configProfileType
string
enum
OSX_CONFIGURATION_PROFILE IOS_CONFIGURATION_PROFILE


curl --request GET \
     --url https://yourserver.jamfcloud.com/api/v1/pki/digicert/trust-lifecycle-manager//dependencies \
     --header 'accept: application/json'

{
  "totalCount": 1,
  "results": [
    {
      "configProfileId": 1,
      "configProfileName": "name",
      "configProfileType": "OSX_CONFIGURATION_PROFILE"
    }
  ]
}
